name: Irish Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measure, combine the warm water and instant coffee crystals.
2. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for about 4 minutes or until steaming hot.
3. Stir in the Irish whiskey and brown sugar.
4. Serve in mugs. Top each mug of coffee mixture with some pressurized dessert topping.
